transcript: Customer: This is an emergency, my package unit keeps short cycling and it's getting bad! This is Patricia Hall at 9 Lakeview Drive. Dispatcher: Okay Patricia, stay calm. I'm getting a technician dispatched to 9 Lakeview Drive right now. Customer: Please hurry. Dispatcher: A tech is on the way, they'll call you when they're close.

expected_entities.issue: emergency: package unit keeps short cycling
